items.summary: Create a Google site verification HTML file at frontend/public/googleXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.html (using a placeholder filename that follows Google's standard verification file naming pattern, e.g. google-site-verification.html) that contains the standard Google verification meta tag content. Since the actual verification code must be provided by the user from Google Search Console, add a clearly named placeholder file at frontend/public/google-site-verification.html with instructional content explaining that the user must replace this file with the actual file downloaded from Google Search Console (https://search.google.com/search-console), which will have a filename like 'googleXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.html' and content like 'google-site-verificationXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX'.
